title: Nursery Rhyme. CLIII. Songs.
content:
Old Father of the Pye,
        I cannot sing, my lips are dry;
        But when my lips are very well wet,
        Then I can sing with the Heigh go Bet!
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CLIII. Songs." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
